question: A 6-month-old with fever 40°C, bulging fontanelle, neck stiffness.

explanation.why_correct: The presentation is classic for Bacterial Meningitis. This is a emergency_reasoning case requiring prompt recognition.

why_wrong.Viral Meningitis: Viral Meningitis has different presentation and findings than Bacterial Meningitis.
why_wrong.Encephalitis: Encephalitis has different presentation and findings than Bacterial Meningitis.
why_wrong.Febrile Seizure: Febrile Seizure has different presentation and findings than Bacterial Meningitis.

media.description: Emergency ECG - Identify the life-threatening rhythm
